purpose: Post a display-only kind-9 chat announcement ("<admitter> admitted <new member>") when an admin approves a pending join request, mirroring the existing group_renamed announcement pattern end-to-end.

purpose_by_module.marmot-structured-content: Owns the member_admitted variant added to the StructuredContent union and its parse guard (app/src/lib/marmot/parseStructured.ts).
purpose_by_module.chat-render: Owns the new render branch in ChatBox.renderStructuredMessage that resolves admitter (msg.senderPubkey) and member (structured.pubkey) display names and dispatches to the new presentational component.
purpose_by_module.group-announcements: Owns the new MemberAdmittedChatAnnouncement.tsx presentational component, cloned from GroupRenamedChatAnnouncement.tsx.
purpose_by_module.i18n: Owns the groups.admittedMemberAnnouncement copy key (en+de) added to Copy type + language objects.
purpose_by_module.groups-page: Owns the single send site: handleApproveRequest fires the announcement via sendAnnouncementRef only after approveJoinRequest returns { ok: true }.

public_api.name: StructuredContent (member_admitted variant)
public_api.description: New union member added to app/src/lib/marmot/parseStructured.ts. Payload carries only the admitted member's pubkey — no admitter field, by design (DD-2: admitter attribution is never payload-carried).

public_api.name: parseStructured
public_api.description: Existing pure function; extended with a guard for type==='member_admitted' && typeof pubkey==='string'. No signature change.

public_api.name: MemberAdmittedChatAnnouncement
public_api.description: New presentational component, app/src/components/groups/MemberAdmittedChatAnnouncement.tsx. Renders copy.groups.admittedMemberAnnouncement(admitterDisplay, memberDisplay) inside a Box with data-testid="member-admitted-announcement", styling cloned verbatim from GroupRenamedChatAnnouncement.tsx.

public_api.name: copy.groups.admittedMemberAnnouncement
public_api.description: New i18n Copy entry, app/src/lib/i18n.ts. en: "${admitter} admitted ${member}"; de: correct German equivalent.

owned_data: StructuredContent member_admitted variant shape (owned by marmot-structured-content, per architecture.md seam declaration)
dependencies_allowed: groups-page -> marmot-structured-content (payload shape only, via JSON.stringify — no import)
dependencies_forbidden: No new cross-module coupling beyond the group_renamed seam already declared in architecture.md
No self-reported admitter field in the payload (security invariant, DD-2)
No announcement on the direct-invite path (InviteMemberModal / invite-by-npub) — AC-SCOPE-1
events_emitted: kind-9 application rumor: { type: 'member_admitted', pubkey: string } — sent via sendAnnouncementRef.current on successful join-request approval only
events_consumed: kind-9 application rumor content, parsed by parseStructured and branched in ChatBox.renderStructuredMessage
test_targets: app/tests/unit/marmot/parseStructured.test.ts (AC-PARSE-1, AC-PARSE-2, AC-ATTR-1 via resolveCancellerDisplay-style resolution + payload-shape assertion)
app/tests/e2e/groups-member-admitted-announcement.spec.ts (AC-RENDER-1, AC-RENDER-2, AC-SEND-1, AC-SCOPE-1 end-to-end through the real app)
notes: Single-story epic (S1 is the only story). Five existing modules are each extended along a seam they already expose for the group_renamed sibling per architecture.md; no new module is created. This story does not carry is_integration_story: true — the Boundary check crosses marmot-structured-content -> chat-render -> group-announcements -> i18n and groups-page -> (payload contract), all declared as the single seam in architecture.md's Seams section, so no Architect escalation was needed.
